title: Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring marinated beef skewers grilled to perfection. This recipe is perfect for a summer barbecue or outdoor gathering.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the spice mixture to the beef and mix well.
4. Thread the marinated beef onto skewers.
5. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the beef skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
7. Remove from heat and serve with grilled red pepper and argentinian chimichurri sauce.
8. Let rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
